name: R-2 (SS-79)
events: This page was last updated in August 2016.
16 Jun 1941 USS R-2 (Lt. D.T. Hammond, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Key West, Florida.
22 Jun 1941 USS R-2 (Lt. D.T. Hammond, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida. She was based there for the entire war serving with the Fleet Sonar School.
[Not much is currently known to us about the exploits of USS R-2 before April 1942.]
